title: New Classes
excerpt: While it's really fun designing collections, I think it's even better when I get to teach classes with them. And even better than that is actually meeting so many of you creatives in person! I have added some links in…
body: While it's really fun designing collections, I think it's even better when I get to teach classes with them. And even better than that is actually meeting so many of you creatives in person! I have added some links in the sidebar ------> under Upcoming Events. There are a couple more I am finalizing details for, but if you own a store or know of one that wants to host me, there's only 1 or 2 spots open for the summer. Would love to hear from the stores that are interested! Can't wait to see some of you soon. PS- I will be at Craftcation Conference for the 3rd year in a row. It's really such an amazing gathering and I would highly recommend attending. You can see my past posts about it here and learn more about the one coming up in April here.
